title.en: Reading 802.1DG: Scope, Conformance Profiles, and the ATS + CBS Shapers
title.zh: 读懂 802.1DG：标准范围、一致性档案，以及 ATS 与 CBS 整形器

blocks.en: IEEE Std 802.1DG-2025 is a TSN (Time-Sensitive Networking) *profile* for automotive in-vehicle Ethernet. A profile does not invent new mechanisms; instead it selects a focused subset of the broad IEEE 802.1 toolbox and tells car-network designers exactly which features to turn on and how to configure them so that latency stays bounded. Clause 1 sets the stage: 1.1 Scope says the standard specifies profiles for bounded-latency automotive bridged IEEE 802.3 (Ethernet) networks built on IEEE 802.1 TSN standards; 1.2 Purpose says those profiles serve designers and implementers of in-vehicle networks (IVNs) supporting a wide range of vehicle applications.
blocks.zh: IEEE Std 802.1DG-2025 是面向车载以太网的 TSN（Time-Sensitive Networking，时间敏感网络）*档案（profile）*。档案本身不发明新机制，而是从庞大的 IEEE 802.1 工具箱中挑出一个聚焦的子集，告诉车载网络设计者究竟该打开哪些特性、如何配置，从而把时延约束在可控范围内。Clause 1 先做铺垫：1.1 Scope（范围）说明本标准为基于 IEEE 802.1 TSN 标准、有界时延的车载桥接 IEEE 802.3（以太网）网络规定档案；1.2 Purpose（目的）说明这些档案服务于支撑各类车载应用的车载网络（IVN，in-vehicle network）的设计者与实现者。

blocks.en: Clause 1 also explains *how to read the document*. 1.3 Requirements terminology defines the conformance verbs: 'shall' = mandatory, 'should' = recommended, 'may' = permitted (these appear in Clause 5 and Annex A), while 'might'/'can' express possibility and 'is'/'does' merely describe behavior elsewhere. It also defines status words 'Supported', 'Activated', and 'Not activated'. 1.4 Introduction frames the profile's mission: pick from IEEE 802.1 the features applicable to IVNs and explain how to configure their optional parameters. 1.5 Outline of the document structure is the road map: Clause 5 aggregates ALL conformance language, while Clauses 6 through 8 describe the TSN features in detail and point back to the base standards. 1.6 Reference conventions introduces a shorthand so the text can cite other standards compactly, e.g. '[Q] x.y' means subclause x.y of IEEE Std 802.1Q-2022, '[DC] x.y' means 802.1DC-2024, and a bare 'x.y' means this standard.
blocks.zh: Clause 1 还讲解了*如何阅读本文档*。1.3 Requirements terminology（要求术语）定义一致性动词：'shall' = 强制，'should' = 推荐，'may' = 允许（这些出现在 Clause 5 与 Annex A 中）；而 'might'/'can' 表示可能性，'is'/'does' 在其他章节仅描述行为。它还定义状态词 'Supported（已支持）'、'Activated（已启用）' 与 'Not activated（未启用）'。1.4 Introduction（引言）点明档案使命：从 IEEE 802.1 中挑出适用于 IVN 的特性，并说明如何配置其可选参数。1.5 Outline of the document structure（文档结构概要）是导航图：Clause 5 汇总*所有*一致性语言，而 Clause 6 至 Clause 8 详述各 TSN 特性并回指基础标准。1.6 Reference conventions（引用约定）引入一套简写，使正文可紧凑地引用其他标准，例如 '[Q] x.y' 表示 IEEE Std 802.1Q-2022 的 x.y 子条款，'[DC] x.y' 表示 802.1DC-2024，而裸写的 'x.y' 指本标准自身。

blocks.en: Key insight: 802.1DG deliberately puts every 'shall/should/may' in one place — Clause 5. Clauses 6, 7, and 8 are explicitly *non-normative interpretation and configuration guidance*; if they ever conflict with the base standard, the base standard wins. So 'conformance lives in Clause 5; the how-to lives in Clauses 6-8.'
blocks.zh: 关键要点：802.1DG 刻意把所有 'shall/should/may' 集中在一处——Clause 5。Clause 6、7、8 明确属于*非规范性的解释与配置指南*；若它们与基础标准冲突，以基础标准为准。因此可记住：'一致性在 Clause 5，操作方法在 Clause 6-8。'

blocks.en: Clause 5 is the conformance core. 5.1 Introduction states it specifies the mandatory and optional capabilities of conformant implementations. 5.2 Profile Conformance Statements (PCS) requires a supplier to fill out the PCS proforma in Annex A and identify both supplier and implementation. 5.3 Physical Layer requirements is short and firm: any conforming station shall support an IEEE 802.3 point-to-point full-duplex link segment — automotive Ethernet is switched and full-duplex, never a shared bus. The rest of Clause 5 layers requirements onto two device roles (bridge, end station) and five reusable bundles called Station Requirements A through E (SR-A...SR-E).
blocks.zh: Clause 5 是一致性核心。5.1 Introduction（引言）声明它规定一致性实现的强制与可选能力。5.2 Profile Conformance Statements（PCS，档案一致性声明）要求供应商填写 Annex A 中的 PCS 模板，并标明供应商与实现的标识。5.3 Physical Layer requirements（物理层要求）简短而坚决：任何一致性站点都应支持 IEEE 802.3 点到点全双工链路段——车载以太网是交换式、全双工的，绝非共享总线。Clause 5 的其余部分把要求叠加到两类设备角色（桥 bridge、端站 end station）以及五个可复用的能力包——Station Requirements A 到 E（SR-A…SR-E）之上。

blocks.en:
flowchart TD
  PCS["5.2 PCS proforma (Annex A)"] --> PHY["5.3 PHY: 802.3 full-duplex link"]
  PHY --> BR["5.4 Bridge: SR-A + SR-B + SR-C (mandatory)"]
  PHY --> ES["5.5 End station: SR-B (mandatory)"]
  BR -.optional.-> SRD1["SR-D / SR-E"]
  ES -.optional.-> SRD2["SR-D / SR-E"]
  SRA["5.6 SR-A: VLAN, priority, stream ID, ATS+CBS"]
  SRB["5.7 SR-B: frame types, SDU filter, flow meter"]
  SRC["5.8 SR-C: strict priority, CBS, ATS"]
  SRD["5.9 SR-D: time sync, EST, stream gates"]
  SRE["5.10 SR-E: preemptable + express MAC"]
blocks.zh:
flowchart TD
  PCS["5.2 PCS 模板 (Annex A)"] --> PHY["5.3 物理层: 802.3 全双工链路"]
  PHY --> BR["5.4 桥: SR-A + SR-B + SR-C (强制)"]
  PHY --> ES["5.5 端站: SR-B (强制)"]
  BR -.可选.-> SRD1["SR-D / SR-E"]
  ES -.可选.-> SRD2["SR-D / SR-E"]
  SRA["5.6 SR-A: VLAN、优先级、流标识、ATS+CBS"]
  SRB["5.7 SR-B: 帧类型、SDU 过滤、流量计"]
  SRC["5.8 SR-C: 严格优先级、CBS、ATS"]
  SRD["5.9 SR-D: 时间同步、EST、流门"]
  SRE["5.10 SR-E: 可抢占 MAC + 快速 MAC"]

blocks.en: Now the two shaper clauses. Both are *configuration guidance* (non-normative), and both follow the same disclaimer pattern: conformance is to the base standard, and the base standard wins on conflict. Clause 6 covers the Asynchronous Traffic Shaper (ATS). ATS is a per-stream token-bucket-style shaper (defined in IEEE 802.1Q Clause 47 and 8.6.11) that re-times each frame's eligibility independently, so it does not need a network-wide time schedule — hence 'asynchronous'. 6.1 Purpose says the clause gives system integrators configuration guidelines to simplify setup and avoid misconfiguration. 6.2 ATS configuration parameters lists what you actually set per scheduler instance: ATS-CIR (committed information rate), ATS-CBS (committed burst size), ATS-MRT (maximum residence time, per scheduler group), the group-membership parameters, and the mapping of received frames to scheduler instances and egress traffic classes (TCs).
blocks.zh: 接下来是两个整形器章节。两者都是*配置指南*（非规范性），且都遵循相同的免责声明模式：一致性以基础标准为准，冲突时以基础标准为准。Clause 6 讲 Asynchronous Traffic Shaper（ATS，异步流量整形器）。ATS 是一种逐流的令牌桶式整形器（定义于 IEEE 802.1Q 第 47 章及 8.6.11），它独立地为每一帧重新计算可发送时刻，因而无需全网时间表——故称'异步'。6.1 Purpose（目的）说明本章为系统集成者提供配置指南，以简化部署、避免错误配置。6.2 ATS configuration parameters（ATS 配置参数）列出每个调度器实例实际要设置的项：ATS-CIR（committed information rate，承诺信息速率）、ATS-CBS（committed burst size，承诺突发大小）、ATS-MRT（maximum residence time，最大驻留时间，按调度器组设置）、组成员关系参数，以及把收到的帧映射到调度器实例与出口流量类别（TC，traffic class）的参数。

blocks.en: 6.3 Implicit policing is a neat property: because ATS meters every frame against ATS-CIR and ATS-CBS, it already polices traffic for free. The clause even gives a translation to MEF flow-meter parameters: MEF-CIR(ATS)=ATS-CIR, MEF-CBS(ATS)=ATS-CBS, with the excess rate/burst (MEF-EIR/EBS) set to 0 and color-blind, coupling-flag-off operation. In bridges, maximum SDU-size filtering discards any frame larger than ATS-CBS before it reaches the scheduler, so no extra flow meter is required. 6.4 ATS Traffic class mapping configuration in bridges spells out the mapping rules: by default no IPV (internal priority value) is assigned in the stream gates, so the ingress priority maps to the egress TC; a stream stays in the same numeric TC on every hop; frames from different ports — or using a different TC anywhere — are never handled by the same ATS scheduler instance; and end-station applications can shape with one ATS instance per application, but mixing middleware triggering (e.g. AUTOSAR nPDU aggregation) with lower-layer shaping is to be avoided.
blocks.zh: 6.3 Implicit policing（隐式监管）是一个巧妙的性质：由于 ATS 会按 ATS-CIR 与 ATS-CBS 对每一帧计量，它实际上已免费完成了流量监管。本章甚至给出到 MEF 流量计参数的换算：MEF-CIR(ATS)=ATS-CIR、MEF-CBS(ATS)=ATS-CBS，超额速率/突发（MEF-EIR/EBS）置 0，并采用色盲、耦合标志关闭的运行方式。在桥中，最大 SDU 尺寸过滤会在帧进入调度器前丢弃任何大于 ATS-CBS 的帧，因而无需额外流量计。6.4 ATS Traffic class mapping configuration in bridges（桥中的 ATS 流量类别映射配置）列明映射规则：默认在流门中不分配 IPV（internal priority value，内部优先级值），故入口优先级直接映射到出口 TC；一条流在每一跳都停留在相同数值的 TC；来自不同端口、或在网络任意处使用不同 TC 的帧，绝不由同一个 ATS 调度器实例处理；端站应用可按每应用一个 ATS 实例进行整形，但应避免把中间件触发（如 AUTOSAR nPDU 聚合）与底层整形混用。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 440 160" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><text x="10" y="18" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="12">ATS scheduler instance (per stream)</text><rect x="10" y="30" width="90" height="40"/><text x="20" y="55" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="11">ingress frames</text><line x1="100" y1="50" x2="150" y2="50"/><rect x="150" y="25" width="120" height="50"/><text x="160" y="45" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="11">token bucket</text><text x="160" y="62" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="10">CIR + CBS</text><line x1="270" y1="50" x2="320" y2="50"/><rect x="320" y="30" width="100" height="40"/><text x="330" y="48" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="10">egress TC queue</text><text x="330" y="62" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="10">(same TC per hop)</text><text x="150" y="110" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="11">implicit policing: discard if size > CBS</text><rect x="150" y="120" width="120" height="28"/><text x="158" y="138" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="10">max SDU-size filter</text></svg>

caption.en: ATS shapes each stream through its own token bucket (ATS-CIR/ATS-CBS), maps to one TC kept constant per hop, and polices implicitly by dropping frames larger than ATS-CBS (Clause 6.2-6.4).
caption.zh: ATS 用各自的令牌桶（ATS-CIR/ATS-CBS）对每条流整形，映射到逐跳保持不变的同一 TC，并通过丢弃大于 ATS-CBS 的帧实现隐式监管（Clause 6.2-6.4）。

blocks.en: Clause 7 covers the Credit-based shaper (CBS, defined in IEEE 802.1Q 34.6.1.1 / 8.6.8.2). CBS smooths a traffic class by accumulating 'credit' while idle and spending it while transmitting, so bursts are spread out rather than slammed onto the wire. 7.1 Purpose mirrors ATS: configuration guidance to avoid misconfiguration. 7.2 Credit-based shaper configuration says per TC you set the idle slope (CBS-IS) and select CBS as the transmission-selection algorithm, plus you need portTransmitRate (the egress line rate), the media-dependent overhead, and maxInterferenceTime (a generalized form of 802.1Q L.1 d)). 7.3 Policing configuration flags the key contrast with ATS: CBS provides NO implicit policing, so every CBS-queued frame still needs a max-SDU-size filter and a flow meter; the clause supplies the suggested settings (MEF-CIR=CBS-IS, MEF-CBS=maxBurstSize derived from 802.1Q Equation L-4, excess rate/burst 0, color-blind).
blocks.zh: Clause 7 讲 Credit-based shaper（CBS，基于信用的整形器，定义于 IEEE 802.1Q 34.6.1.1 / 8.6.8.2）。CBS 在空闲时累积'信用'、发送时消耗信用，从而把突发摊平、而非一次性灌入链路。7.1 Purpose（目的）与 ATS 一致：提供配置指南以避免错误配置。7.2 Credit-based shaper configuration（CBS 配置）说明每个 TC 要设置 idle slope（CBS-IS，空闲斜率）并选择 CBS 作为传输选择算法；此外还需 portTransmitRate（出口线速率）、媒介相关开销，以及 maxInterferenceTime（802.1Q L.1 d) 的更一般化表述）。7.3 Policing configuration（监管配置）点明与 ATS 的关键差异：CBS *不*提供隐式监管，故每个进入 CBS 队列的帧仍需最大 SDU 尺寸过滤与流量计；本节给出建议设置（MEF-CIR=CBS-IS、MEF-CBS=maxBurstSize，由 802.1Q 公式 L-4 导出，超额速率/突发为 0、色盲）。

blocks.en: 7.4 Configuration rules warns about a real hazard from 802.1Q Annex L: CBS can build up undesired buffer occupancy and latency in bridges. If traffic that was shaped together in one CBS instance upstream then splits to different egress ports downstream, you must configure the downstream ports (and the rest of the path) with the *aggregated* bandwidth to avoid undue shaping delay. And traffic egressing a bridge on the very last link to the Listener (the receiver) need not be CBS-shaped at all — though that may demand more buffer in the end station. The takeaway: CBS is simple and cheap, but you pay attention to where streams merge and split, and you don't shape on the final hop where it buys you nothing.
blocks.zh: 7.4 Configuration rules（配置规则）提醒一个源自 802.1Q Annex L 的真实隐患：CBS 可能在桥中累积出不期望的缓冲占用与时延。若上游在一个 CBS 实例中合并整形的流量，到下游又分流到不同出口端口，则必须用*聚合后*的带宽来配置下游端口（及其后续路径），以免造成不当的整形延迟。而桥在通向 Listener（接收端）的最后一段链路上出口的流量，根本无需用 CBS 整形——尽管这可能要求端站提供更多缓冲。要点是：CBS 简单廉价，但要留意流量在何处合并与分流，并且在最后一跳不做无谓的整形。

summary.en: Coverage map — every clause number in this lesson
summary.zh: 覆盖地图——本课涉及的每个条款编号

blocks.en: Clause 1 Overview: 1.1 Scope (profiles for bounded-latency automotive bridged Ethernet on 802.1 TSN); 1.2 Purpose (serve IVN designers/implementers); 1.3 Requirements terminology (shall/should/may in Clause 5 & Annex A; might/can/is/does elsewhere; Supported/Activated/Not activated); 1.4 Introduction (narrow 802.1 to IVN-applicable features + configure options); 1.5 Outline (Clause 5 = all conformance language; Clauses 6-8 = feature detail); 1.6 Reference conventions ([Q]=802.1Q-2022, [DC]=802.1DC-2024, bare x.y=this standard, Table 1-1). Clause 5 Conformance: 5.1 Introduction (mandatory + optional capabilities); 5.2 PCS (complete Annex A proforma, identify supplier+implementation); 5.3 PHY (802.3 point-to-point full-duplex link segment); 5.4.1 Mandatory bridge requirements (C-VLAN, conform SR-A/B/C, learning, max SDU size, ingress/egress/frame filtering, >=1024 MAC reg entries, static IPV, stream gating); 5.4.2 Bridge options (>=1 time-sync should; may SR-D/SR-E/MACsec); 5.5.1 Mandatory end-station ingress (conform SR-B, out-facing stream ID, >=64 stream-ID functions, stream-filter + max-SDU-size filtering); 5.5.2 Mandatory end-station egress (ATS talker on 1 TC, CBS on two highest TCs, queuing, 8 TCs, transmission selection); 5.5.3 End-station options (time sync, SR-D/SR-E, MACsec, ingress stream gating, ingress flow metering); 5.6 SR-A (port VLAN classification, PCP decode, priority regen, ingress stream ID, scaling 128/192/256 functions, active topology enforcement, ingress/egress filtering, queuing, 8 TCs, transmission selection, ATS on 1 TC, CBS on two highest TCs, VID translation); 5.7 SR-B (acceptable frame types, max SDU-size filtering, flow metering); 5.8 SR-C (strict priority algorithm, CBS per 8.6.8.2, ATS per 8.6.5.2.2/8.6.8.5/8.6.11); 5.9 SR-D (may: time sync, EST, stream gates, gate-control-list length > 0); 5.10 SR-E (may: preemptable MAC, express MAC). Clause 6 ATS: 6.1 Purpose (config guidance, non-normative, base standard wins); 6.2 parameters (ATS-CIR, ATS-CBS, ATS-MRT, group membership, frame->instance & egress-TC mapping); 6.3 Implicit policing (MEF mapping; max-SDU filter drops > ATS-CBS; no extra flow meter); 6.4 TC mapping in bridges (no default IPV, priority->egress TC, same numeric TC per hop, no shared instance across ports/TCs, end-station per-application shaping, avoid middleware+shaper mix). Clause 7 CBS: 7.1 Purpose (config guidance, base standard wins); 7.2 config (CBS-IS idle slope, CBS algorithm, portTransmitRate, media-dependent overhead, maxInterferenceTime); 7.3 Policing (no implicit policing -> max-SDU filter + flow meter; MEF-CIR=CBS-IS, MEF-CBS=maxBurstSize from Eq L-4); 7.4 Configuration rules (aggregated bandwidth on split paths, no CBS on last link to Listener, buffer/latency trade-off).
blocks.zh: Clause 1 概述：1.1 范围（在 802.1 TSN 之上为有界时延的车载桥接以太网规定档案）；1.2 目的（服务 IVN 设计者/实现者）；1.3 要求术语（shall/should/may 用于 Clause 5 与 Annex A；其他处用 might/can/is/does；Supported/Activated/Not activated）；1.4 引言（把 802.1 收窄到适用 IVN 的特性并配置其选项）；1.5 结构概要（Clause 5 = 全部一致性语言；Clause 6-8 = 特性细节）；1.6 引用约定（[Q]=802.1Q-2022，[DC]=802.1DC-2024，裸 x.y=本标准，Table 1-1）。Clause 5 一致性：5.1 引言（强制+可选能力）；5.2 PCS（填写 Annex A 模板，标识供应商+实现）；5.3 物理层（802.3 点到点全双工链路段）；5.4.1 强制桥要求（C-VLAN、符合 SR-A/B/C、学习过程、最大 SDU 尺寸、入口/出口/帧过滤、>=1024 条 MAC 注册项、静态 IPV、流门）；5.4.2 桥可选项（应支持至少一种时间同步；可选 SR-D/SR-E/MACsec）；5.5.1 强制端站入口（符合 SR-B、外向流标识、>=64 个流标识功能、流过滤器+最大 SDU 尺寸过滤）；5.5.2 强制端站出口（1 个 TC 上的 ATS 发送者、两个最高 TC 上的 CBS、帧排队、8 个 TC、传输选择）；5.5.3 端站可选项（时间同步、SR-D/SR-E、MACsec、入口流门、入口流量计量）；5.6 SR-A（端口 VLAN 分类、PCP 解码、优先级再生、入口流标识、128/192/256 个功能的规模、活动拓扑强制、入口/出口过滤、排队、8 个 TC、传输选择、1 个 TC 上 ATS、两个最高 TC 上 CBS、VID 转换）；5.7 SR-B（可接受帧类型、最大 SDU 尺寸过滤、流量计量）；5.8 SR-C（严格优先级算法、按 8.6.8.2 的 CBS、按 8.6.5.2.2/8.6.8.5/8.6.11 的 ATS）；5.9 SR-D（可：时间同步、EST、流门、门控列表长度>0）；5.10 SR-E（可：可抢占 MAC、快速 MAC）。Clause 6 ATS：6.1 目的（配置指南，非规范性，以基础标准为准）；6.2 参数（ATS-CIR、ATS-CBS、ATS-MRT、组成员关系、帧->实例与出口 TC 映射）；6.3 隐式监管（MEF 换算；最大 SDU 过滤丢弃 > ATS-CBS 的帧；无需额外流量计）；6.4 桥中 TC 映射（默认无 IPV、优先级->出口 TC、逐跳同一数值 TC、不跨端口/TC 共享实例、端站按应用整形、避免中间件+整形混用）。Clause 7 CBS：7.1 目的（配置指南，以基础标准为准）；7.2 配置（CBS-IS 空闲斜率、CBS 算法、portTransmitRate、媒介相关开销、maxInterferenceTime）；7.3 监管（无隐式监管->最大 SDU 过滤+流量计；MEF-CIR=CBS-IS、MEF-CBS=maxBurstSize 由公式 L-4 得出）；7.4 配置规则（分流路径用聚合带宽、通向 Listener 的最后链路不做 CBS、缓冲/时延权衡）。

blocks.en: ATS vs CBS in one line: ATS is per-stream and self-policing (token bucket per scheduler instance, drops oversize frames for free); CBS is per-traffic-class and needs a separate flow meter + SDU filter. Both are non-mandatory configuration aids — the real 'shall' lives in Clause 5's SR bundles.
blocks.zh: 一句话区分 ATS 与 CBS：ATS 逐流且自带监管（每调度器实例一个令牌桶，免费丢弃超尺寸帧）；CBS 逐流量类别，且需要独立的流量计+SDU 过滤器。两者都是非强制的配置辅助——真正的 'shall' 在 Clause 5 的 SR 能力包里。

cites.note: Clause 1 Overview: 1.1 Scope, 1.2 Purpose, 1.3 Requirements terminology, 1.4 Introduction, 1.5 Outline, 1.6 Reference conventions (Table 1-1).
Clause 5 Conformance: 5.1-5.3, 5.4.1/5.4.2 bridge, 5.5.1/5.5.2/5.5.3 end station, 5.6-5.10 SR-A through SR-E.
Clause 6 ATS: 6.1 Purpose, 6.2 configuration parameters, 6.3 implicit policing, 6.4 TC mapping in bridges.
Clause 7 CBS: 7.1 Purpose, 7.2 CBS configuration, 7.3 policing configuration, 7.4 configuration rules.
